title: Palm Beach International Boat Show
address: 101 S Flagler Dr, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
shortWhy: Dive into Palm Beach's cultural richness.
editorialWhy: Palm Beach International Boat Show — $1.2 billion+ in yachts from inflatables to 90m superyachts. 55,000+ visitors expected. GA and VIP (Windward Experience with premium open bar). Located in West Palm Beach, Flagler Drive Waterfront is a local favorite.
description: Palm Beach International Boat Show — $1.2 billion+ in yachts from inflatables to 90m superyachts. 55,000+ visitors expected. GA and VIP (Windward Experience with premium open bar).

shortWhy: History and culture, local-style.
editorialWhy: Tour the stunning Whitehall mansion, Henry Flagler's 75-room Gilded Age estate. See the private railcar, art collection, and learn the history that built Florida. Located in West Palm Beach, Flagler Museum is a local favorite.

title: West Palm Beach GreenMarket
address: Waterfront Commons, 101 S Flagler Dr, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
shortWhy: Fresh, local, and full of character.
editorialWhy: Award-winning farmers market on the waterfront. 100+ vendors with local produce, artisan food, baked goods, plants, and handmade crafts. Open Oct–April. Located in West Palm Beach, West Palm Beach GreenMarket is a local favorite. Best of all, it's free.
description: Award-winning farmers market on the waterfront. 100+ vendors with local produce, artisan food, baked goods, plants, and handmade crafts. Open Oct–April.

shortWhy: Live sounds in one of Palm Beach's best spots.

shortWhy: Get your music fix with locals who know.

editorialWhy: Monthly evening event with sushi, taiko drumming, Japanese performances, garden tours, and sake tastings at the Morikami Museum. Located in Delray Beach, Morikami Museum & Japanese Gardens is a local favorite.

title: Clematis by Night
address: 101 N Clematis St, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
shortWhy: Get your music fix with locals who know.
editorialWhy: Free weekly outdoor concert series on the WPB Waterfront. Live bands, food trucks, and waterfront vibes every Thursday evening. Located in West Palm Beach, Clematis Street Waterfront is a local favorite. Best of all, it's free.
